question_text: For my daily commute, how much more expensive was the taxi ride compared to the train fare?
How many sessions of the bereavement support group did I attend?

I'm planning a trip to Denver soon. Any suggestions on what to do there?
How many hours did I spend watching documentaries on Netflix last month?
How many model kits have I worked on or bought?
How many days before the 'Rack Fest' did I participate in the 'Turbocharged Tuesdays' event?
What percentage of leadership positions do women hold in the my company?
How many weeks did it take me to watch all the Marvel Cinematic Universe movies and the main Star Wars films?
How many days had passed since I bought my Adidas running shoes when I realized one of the shoelaces on my old Converse sneakers had broken?
How many issues of National Geographic have I finished reading?
What was my previous personal best time for the charity 5K run?
How many properties did I view before making an offer on the townhouse in the Brookside neighborhood?
What is the total number of comments on my recent Facebook Live session and my most popular YouTube video?

Can you remind me what was the average improvement in framerate when using the Hardware-Aware Modular Training (HAMT) agent in the 'To Adapt or Not to Adapt? Real-Time Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation' submission?
Who gave me a new stand mixer as a birthday gift?
Where did Rachel move to after her recent relocation?
How many pages do I have left to read in 'The Nightingale'?
How much will I save by taking the train from the airport to my hotel instead of a taxi?

Where do I currently keep my old sneakers?
Which task did I complete first, fixing the fence or trimming the goats' hooves?
What charity event did I participate in a month ago?
For the coffee-to-water ratio in my French press, did I switch to more water per tablespoon of coffee, or less?
What color did I repaint my bedroom walls?

I was thinking about our previous conversation about data privacy and security. You mentioned that companies use two-factor authentication to enhance security. Can you remind me what kind of two-factor authentication methods you were referring to?
How many days ago did I buy a smoker?
How many plants did I initially plant for tomatoes and chili peppers?

How many days had passed since I finished reading 'The Seven Husbands of Evelyn Hugo' when I attended the book reading event at the local library, where the author of 'The Silent Patient' is discussing her latest thriller novel?
What is the total number of views on my most popular videos on YouTube and TikTok?
